rationale: The citing paper’s design relies heavily on field experimentation (two field studies plus emphasis on “field-based behavioral evidence”), while the cited paper is a marketing methodology article specifically on why/how to conduct field experiments. This thematic and methodological alignment suggests the citation could be a methodological/foundational source rather than a purely incidental mention. With a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmr.16.0225), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
